cases.title: CRUD services dashboard flow
cases.prompt: Design UX for a services dashboard where users add, edit, delete services. Require safe deletion, clear primary action, and full state coverage.

cases.title: Validation timing and field-level feedback
cases.prompt: Create a form UX plan for editing a service with required and format validations. Specify when to validate and where to place messages.

cases.title: Actionable empty and error states
cases.prompt: Design empty and error states for a list page where API failures are common. Require retry options and clear next actions.

cases.title: Fast path and safe path
cases.prompt: For a high-frequency admin task, propose both a fast path for common edits and a safe path for destructive operations.

cases.title: Action-oriented UX copy
cases.prompt: Write UX copy guidelines for buttons, empty states, and errors in a dashboard product.
